[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01010000 2
1 11001010 4
2 11111011 7
3 01010001 3
4 00110000 2
5 11000110 4
6 01110010 4
7 11010111 6

01 10 00000000 a
12 21 01000010 2
23 32 00000010 1
34 43 00010000 1
45 54 01000000 1
56 65 11001010 4 match 1
67 76 01010001 3 match 3
70 07 00010000 1

02 20 00000000 a
13 31 10000110 3
24 42 01000000 1
35 53 10000010 2
46 64 01010000 2 match 0

71 17 01000000 1

47 74 01010000 2 match 0
50 05 00000000 a

72 27 01000000 1
